instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML and Tailwind for marketing/landing page structure; use Shadcn UI exclusively for complex interactions (forms, dialogs, selects, tabs).

Customize Shadcn components to fit the Neo-Brutalist theme: remove border radius (rounded-none), add heavy borders (border-2 border-black), and solid block shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]).
Never use purely transparent headers. Use glassmorphism or a solid background.

Implement a split-pane layout for the product customization page: Sticky left side for the live product preview, scrollable right side for customization tools (photo upload, text input, color selection).
Every interactive or key informational element MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based.
Ensure high contrast ratios (APCA/WCAG AA) especially on text over colored backgrounds.
Use react-fast-marquee for a kinetic typography effect in the background of category sections.
Implement hover states that remove the block shadow and translate the element by 2px/4px to simulate a button press.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8, p-12) mixed with Neo-Brutalist heavy borders. Optical alignment.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Neumorphism/Tactile Variant - Mix hard flat backgrounds with sharp 2px black borders and hard solid shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]). No soft rounded edges.

components_strategy.buttons: Hard rectangular shapes (rounded-none), border-2 border-black, solid block shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]) that transition to translate-y-[4px] translate-x-[4px] shadow-none on hover. Use Work Sans font-bold uppercase.
components_strategy.cards: border-2 border-black bg-white rounded-none p-6 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)].
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn input highly customized: border-2 border-black rounded-none focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] bg-white text-black.
components_strategy.marquee: react-fast-marquee. Kinetic Texture: massive outline text (text-8xl+) running in background for categories.
components_strategy.pdp_customization: Split-pane layout. Left: sticky product visualization wrapper. Right: scrolling customizer options form (Upload, Text, Color).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard block shadow removal on click/hover, translate elements diagonally to simulate physical push.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade up for grid items using framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.pdp_preview: Instant update on text/image upload, with subtle ping animation on the preview container to indicate a change.

hero.description: A stacked set of pastel-colored gift boxes

t_shirt.description: Blank white t-shirt mockup on model

photo_frame.description: Blank photo frame mockup in a living room
